title: agropyron caninum f. pringlei
intro: Agropyron caninum f. pringlei, also known as blue grama, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family and is native to North America. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of blue grama include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and potentially lowering blood sugar levels. Blue grama can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in various herbal supplements and preparations.
